components.title: AILIS private Python runtime
components.description: Small private Python base used by local runtime components. This is not enough by itself to enable TTS or ASR.

components.title: CosyVoice3 local TTS runtime
components.description: High-quality offline TTS runtime. Very large because it includes Torch/CUDA dependencies and CosyVoice3 model files.

components.title: Local ASR runtime
components.description: Offline speech recognition runtime. Users can skip it and use text-only or cloud recognition flows.

components.title: Local Web/Search runtime
components.description: Optional local web/search stack. It should not be bundled into the default installer.
